channel.title: Taskfile generation on Dynamic Simulation Environment
channel.description: Recent content in Taskfile generation on Dynamic Simulation Environment

item.title: Builder - Simulation Development Platform
item.description: Synopsis This document describes the simulation execution workflow and Taskfile.yml generation used by the Simulation Development Platform (SDP). Project folder structure <project> ├── <project>.dse ├── Makefile ├── <project>.json ├── <project>.yaml ├── simulation.yaml ├── Taskfile.yml ├── .task/ │ └── remote/ │ └── <remote-source>.Taskfile.yml.<hash>.yaml ├── out/ │ ├── cache/ │ ├── downloads/ │ │ ├── <downloaded-files> │ │ └── models/ │ │ └── <model>/ │ └── sim/ │ ├── data/ │ │ └── simulation.
